prompt: [PROMPT: COMPLEX DYNAMIC WHITENED ISOMETRIC ILLUSTRATION] A clean, sophisticated isometric 3D vector illustration in the 'Whitened Dynamic Conceptual' style. A horizontal timeline infographic flowing left to right, showing one year of trust evolution between a family and their AI home system. FOUR MILESTONE POINTS along the timeline: MONTH 1 'SUGGEST' (Blue #6C82FE): A small isometric smartphone showing question marks on its screen. A matte black silhouette figure manually operates every control. The figure is actively busy. Text label: 'SUGGEST'. Below: 'AI knows nothing. Every action needs human approval.' MONTH 3 'CONFIRM' (Blue transitioning to Orange gradient): A smartphone showing a personalized recommendation. The silhouette figure presses an approve button. Trust beginning. Label: 'CONFIRM'. Below: 'AI proposes. Human approves.' MONTH 6 'NOTIFY' (Orange #F59400): A smartphone showing just a notification badge. Food items are automatically being delivered to a small house icon. The silhouette figure is relaxed, barely looking. Label: 'NOTIFY'. Below: 'AI acts. Human is informed.' YEAR 1 'AUTO' (Orange transitioning to Pink #FC6978): A perfectly stocked isometric refrigerator icon. The silhouette figure is not looking at any device — turned away, doing something else. Label: 'AUTO'. Below: 'AI handles it. Human lives freely.' BOTTOM LAYER: A constant Blue #6C82FE thin solid horizontal line running beneath the entire timeline, labeled 'Explicit Dial' — representing unchanging rules ($20 spending limit, safety rules). This line never rises or falls. At Month 6, a small downward arrow shows a temporary demotion from Notify back to Confirm (delivery delay exception), then returns to Notify. All elements use clean matte black #111111 outlines. Light Gray #EEEEEE background. Generous whitespace between milestones. Element White on device faces. Soft-cell shading only.
negative_prompt: realistic rendering, photorealistic, gradients, textured outlines, decorative objects, chess pieces, dice, coins, dark background, cluttered, shadows on background, 3D photorealism, realistic people, actual graph/chart software look
